items.identity: Niche: PA+1 with the highest HP of the early hats — the cheap melee hat for a Monk/Archer wanting hat mobility plus a little punch; Headband is the budget-to-cap fork.
items.flavorOverride: A band bound tight across a brawler's brow, lending the arm more weight behind every blow.

items.name: Arcanist Cap
items.identity: ICONIC: MA+1 plus a real MP pool, lowest HP of its tier — the classic caster fork, glassy but more and stronger spells; the MA/MP answer to Martial Band's PA.
items.flavorOverride: A peaked cap stitched with old sigils, sharpening the mind to draw deeper on the arcane.

items.name: Zephyr Beret
items.identity: ICONIC: Speed+1 — the universal tempo hat; more turns on literally any build, no stat-school commitment.
items.flavorOverride: A beret cut light as breeze, quickening the step of whoever wears it into the fray.

items.name: Twisted Headband
items.identity: ICONIC: PA+2, the physical-apex hat — the Monk/Brawler damage cap; Martial Band (PA+1, T3) keeps the budget niche below it.
items.flavorOverride: Wrung and knotted cloth that grips the skull, channeling raw temper into the fist.

items.name: Hierophant Miter
items.identity: ICONIC: MA+2 plus a deep MP well — the mage damage-and-fuel cap; Wizard's Hat (MA+1, T3) keeps the budget niche. The magic counterpart to Headband.
items.flavorOverride: A tall miter that deepens a priest's reserves and the fury of the prayers he hurls.

items.name: Assassin's Cowl
items.identity: Niche: physical-evade (physEv8) plus Move+1 — the rogue/skirmisher hat; reposition and dodge, a mobility-plus-evade lane no other hat offers.
items.flavorOverride: A close-drawn cowl of black weave, made to slip a killer through shadow unseen and unheld.

items.name: Mana Coronet
items.identity: ICONIC: the MP throne of the hats (40, slot max) plus Silence immunity — the artillery-mage hat; bottomless spells that can't be cut off. MP is the identity.
items.flavorOverride: A delicate coronet brimming with stored magick, a well whose voice can never be stilled.

items.name: Lumen Crown
items.identity: ICONIC: the hybrid endgame mage hat — MA+1, Speed+1, MP AND magic-evade (magEv10); the only hat blending magic offense, tempo and mag-defense on one head.
items.flavorOverride: A circlet of soft inner glow, quickening both the spell and the step of the mage below.

items.name: Nightrunner Cap
items.identity: ICONIC: the rogue capstone — Speed+2, top physical-evade (physEv15), immune Disable + Immobilize; the untouchable, unstoppable skirmisher hat.
items.flavorOverride: A close cap for night roads, leaving its wearer swift, unbound, and ahead of the snare.

items.name: Hairband
items.identity: Female partial immunity, half A: +20 HP + immune the 9 'degrade/lock' statuses. One of only 3 HP accessories; the affordable female defense before Ribbon. Disjoint set from Barrette.
items.desc:
A finely crafted hair accessory.
Wards against Doom, Disable, Immobilize, Slow, Poison, Toad, Silence, Blind, and Undead.

proposed.rider: immune Doom, Disable, Immobilize, Slow, Poison, Toad, Silence, Blind, Undead

items.name: Barrette
items.identity: Female partial immunity, half B: +20 HP + immune the 9 'death/mind-control' statuses (incl KO and Petrify). The disjoint other half; together with Hairband equals Ribbon coverage. Neither half dominates the other.
items.desc:
A hairpin adorned with a crimson gem.
Wards against instant death, Stone, Confuse, Vampire, Berserk, Stop, Charm, Sleep, and Traitor.

proposed.rider: immune KO, Stone, Confuse, Vampire, Berserk, Stop, Charm, Sleep, Traitor

items.name: Ribbon
items.identity: Total immunity to every status. The crown jewel - deliberately the LOWEST HP (10) so the +20 half-sets stay viable when you only need one cluster + bulk. Loses the HP axis, so it dominates neither half-set.
items.desc:
A hair accessory made from cloth imbued with mystical energies.
While equipped, grants immunity to most status ailments.

items.name: Roughhide Mail
items.identity: Honest Ch1 starter wall — cheapest heavy body; earliest unlock IS its niche. A riderless anchor protected purely by being the only heavy armor you can have in Ch1.
items.flavorOverride: Boiled hide laced over the chest; the first heavy guard a soldier is ever granted.

items.name: Studded Mail
items.identity: Attrition body — a free Regen tick outlasts a slow poke-war; the early sustain pick for a front-liner who trades blows. (vanillaName Linen Cuirass)
items.flavorOverride: Iron-studded mail layered thick, that its wearer outlast a long, grinding fight.

items.name: Reaver Mail
items.identity: Aggro starter plate — the only early heavy body that pushes Knight/Dragoon damage; offense over a few HP.
items.flavorOverride: Cheap plate for one who'd strike rather than be struck; it lends the arm an angry weight.

items.name: Hushward Mail
items.identity: Anti-hush body — a melee fighter who can never be Silenced; counters enemy mage packs that lock your skillset.
items.flavorOverride: Chain warded inward against the hush, so no enemy spell can still its bearer's tongue.

items.name: Stalwart Plate
items.identity: Clean mid-game HP wall — pure tonnage, no rider tax; the cheap 'just give me bulk' anchor of T3.
items.flavorOverride: Thick mythril plate without ornament or trick, only more iron between flesh and the foe.

items.name: Knight's Plate
items.identity: Front-line bulwark — innate Protect soft-halves all physical damage; the dedicated physical-tank body. (vanillaName Plate Mail)
items.flavorOverride: The plate of a sworn knight, blessed to soften every blow that lands upon its bearer.

items.name: Sungold Mail
items.identity: Pyre-ward plate — heals from Fire (geomancers / enemy Fire mages) but takes extra Water (EB16 weakness); a true defensive sidegrade to Knight's Plate. (vanillaName Golden Armor)
items.flavorOverride: Gilded armor that drinks flame like a hearth, though water seeps through its golden seams.

items.name: Adamant Plate
items.identity: Riderless HP throne of the buyable line — max bulk-per-gil one tier before the T5 wall; pick when you want raw HP and nothing else.
items.flavorOverride: Diamond-scaled plate of immense make, prized by those who measure worth in endurance.

items.name: Warden Plate
items.identity: Anti-lockdown body — immune Stop keeps your tank acting vs Time mages; tempo insurance and the cheaper anti-Stop pick under Crystal Mail. (vanillaName Platinum Armor)
items.flavorOverride: Platinum harness warded so no time-mage's craft can pin or freeze its wearer mid-stride.

items.name: Charger's Plate
items.identity: Tempo plate — a rare +Speed on heavy armor; a tank that takes more turns. The only body that buys initiative.
items.flavorOverride: Heavy mail balanced for the saddle, light enough that its bearer moves a half-beat sooner.

items.name: Crystalward Mail
items.identity: Petrify-proof crystal — immune to Stop AND Stone; hard counter to Break/Petrify plus Time-mage lockdown; top buyable HP.
items.flavorOverride: Mail grown from living crystal, proof against the stillness of stone and a halted clock.

items.name: Genji Armor
items.identity: Samurai/Knight offensive capstone — top-tier HP PLUS PA+2; the rare plate for a damage build, not just a wall. Iconic name preserved.
items.desc:
Crimson enameled armor made using the techniques of a distant land. Provides complete protection for torso and hips.
Physical Attack +2.

items.name: Mirrorscale Mail
items.identity: The Reflect body — bounces enemy single-target magic back at the caster; the only Reflect armor. Iconic name preserved.
items.flavorOverride: Mirror-bright scales that hurl an enemy's spellcraft back upon the hand that cast it.

items.name: Maximillian
items.identity: HP throne — the single highest body HP in the game (160, well under the 255 cap for headroom), now with innate Shell to blunt the magic raw HP can't dodge; the endgame wall. Iconic name preserved.
items.desc:
Top-grade armor made using the finest materials and advanced techniques for unmatched strength.
Grants Shell.

items.name: Wayfarer's Garb
items.identity: The one riderless floor. Cheapest, available first, the bare body everything above earns its keep against. Pick when nothing else is affordable yet.
items.flavorOverride: Plain travelling clothes, all a recruit can scrape up before the road takes the rest.

items.name: Emberweave Vest
items.identity: Early Fire-resist body (reuses vanilla EB16) — absorb Fire, halve Ice, slightly weak to Water. The budget anti-Bomb/anti-Fire-mage pick before any heavy resist exists.
items.flavorOverride: Leather treated to swallow flame and shrug off frost, though cold water finds the skin.

items.name: Trailwarden Jerkin
items.identity: Nimble light body — +1 Move for skirmishers and archers. The early mobility pick when positioning beats raw HP.
items.flavorOverride: A ranger's jerkin cut for long ground, easing the stride of all who must cover it.

items.name: Wardweave Vest
items.identity: Traveler's tri-element ward (reuses vanilla EB19) — halves all three primary elements. The broad-resist budget body for mixed-element fights.
items.flavorOverride: Ringed cloth a ward-weaver hung against flame, frost, and storm in equal measure.

items.name: Tempo Vest
items.identity: Tempo body — +1 Speed to act sooner each round. The light-armor speed pick before Ninja Gear exists. Pick when you want more turns out of a unit.
items.flavorOverride: Mythril-laced cloth that quickens the limbs, so its wearer takes the field a moment ahead.

items.name: Wardsilk Vest
items.identity: Caster-safety body — never get Silenced out of your spells. Pick when your mage must keep casting through enemy Silence.
items.flavorOverride: Silk woven with a guarding charm, keeping a caster's voice when an enemy would hush it.

items.name: Mage's Wrap
items.identity: ICONIC MP body (Wizard Clothing) — +18 MP and +1 MA. The mage's light armor: trades HP for spell uptime + a touch of power. MP+MA is the whole identity, so its lower HP is never a strict loss.
items.flavorOverride: A mage's wrap deep with hidden power, sparing spellcraft and sharpening it both at once.

items.name: Bulwark Brigandine
items.identity: Durable front-line cloth — innate Protect halves incoming physical. Heavy-armor-like survivability with universal access and no Equip ability. The light bruiser's wall.
items.flavorOverride: Layered brigandine stitched as a soft wall, blunting a blow without the burden of plate.

items.name: Adept's Gi
items.identity: ICONIC Monk body (vanilla EB30) — +1 PA and immune to instant-death (Death/KO). Pick for a melee unit that must not get one-shot by Death spells.
items.flavorOverride: A disciple's gi that hardens the arm and steels the spirit against death's cold reach.

items.name: Berserker's Garb
items.identity: ICONIC +PA bruiser body (vanilla EB31) — the clean physical-attack stat stick. Pick when maximizing Monk/Ninja/melee damage.
items.flavorOverride: Battle-garb cut for the raging fighter, every seam straining to feed a hungrier swing.

items.name: Terraweave Garb
items.identity: ICONIC Earth body (vanilla EB32) — heal from Earth attacks and boost your own Earth/Geomancy, plus a little MP. Pick for Earth builds or against enemy Earth nukes.
items.flavorOverride: Earthen-dyed cloth that draws up the soil's strength, turning the ground's fury to gain.

items.name: Ninja Gear
items.identity: ICONIC assassin body (vanilla EB33) — pure agility: +2 Speed and start each battle Invisible, traded for deliberately low HP. End-tier rare for a fast striker who opens from stealth.
items.desc:
Lightweight clothing that allows the wearer to blend into their surroundings. Ideal for covert missions.
Speed +2. Begins battle Transparent.

items.name: Nightweave Garb
items.identity: Anti-Stop durability body (vanilla EB34) — the highest-HP light body that can never be time-locked out of the fight. The near-pure HP wall.
items.flavorOverride: Night-black garb spun thick, keeping its wearer free of any moment-freezing spell.

items.name: Rubber Suit
items.identity: ICONIC Rubber body (vanilla EB35) — fully null Lightning, high HP and some MP. End-tier rare. Hard counter to Thunder/Bolt fights or a hybrid-caster anchor.
items.desc:
Electrically insulated clothing made from a special resin that molds to the contours of the wearer's body.
Nullifies Lightning damage.

items.name: Penitent's Robe
items.identity: T1 starter caster body — cheapest, earliest robe. Lowest HP/MP in the line but the ONLY robe with innate Regen (EB5): heals every turn. The budget attrition mage that out-sustains a plain riderless stat-stick in early poke wars.
items.flavorOverride: A penitent's coarse robe; by grace the faithful see where the proud go blind.

items.name: Acolyte Robe
items.identity: T2 early-offense sidegrade to the Penitent's — trades Regen sustain for +1 Magic Attack (EB10). The first damage robe; heal-over-time vs hit-harder-now is the early fork. Earliest MA in the slot.
items.flavorOverride: An acolyte's simple silk, lent power enough to make a young caster's first cantrips bite.

items.name: Magus Robe
items.identity: T3 pure spell-power body — +2 Magic Attack (EB36), zero defensive frills. Biggest flat MA in the slot; the black/white/time-mage damage default through mid-game. The OFFENSE half of the T3 fork with Chameleon.
items.flavorOverride: A mage's robe heavy with stored arcana, swelling every incantation the wearer dares speak.

items.name: Vesper Robe
items.identity: ICONIC. The SURVIVAL half of the T3 fork — absorbs Holy (heal off enemy/ally Holy) and immune to instant-KO (EB37). Pick vs Holy-slinging foes (Knights Templar, undead) or Death-spam fights. More HP/MP than Magus but gives up its MA+2: offense vs survival, neither dominates.
items.flavorOverride: Shifting robe of vespertine hue that feeds on holy light and turns aside death's touch.

items.name: Wardlight Robe
items.identity: ICONIC. The element-DEFENSE robe — halves all three primary attack elements (EB19). The durable caster who walks into enemy Fire/Bolt/Ice crossfire. More HP than its Black twin (defense = more body) at a touch less MP.
items.flavorOverride: Pale ward-robe that tempers flame, frost, and storm for the caster who walks a crossfire.

items.name: Channeler's Robe
items.identity: ICONIC. The element-OFFENSE twin of White Robe (same tier, same 3 elements, opposite intent) — boosts the WEARER's own Fire/Lightning/Ice spells (EB18). Glass cannon: more MP than White (more spells to throw) but less HP and no resist. Pick to nuke harder, not survive.
items.flavorOverride: Dark robe that hones fire, frost, and storm to a finer point at a whispered word.

items.name: Empyrean Robe
items.identity: T5 MP throne — highest MP short of the capstone. Its vanilla rider slot was empty; repurposed to innate Float (EB46): dodge Earth/Quake/floor-trap damage and ignore terrain. The battlefield-control caster body — a mobility/immunity trait even Lordly lacks, so it stands on its own axis, not just availability.
items.flavorOverride: Robe of the high heavens, deep with reserves, lifting its wearer a breath above the earth.

items.name: Lordly Robe
items.identity: ICONIC capstone (rare/poach, T6). Top HP & MP of the line PLUS PA+2/MA+1 and innate Protect+Shell (EB41) — the king's robe, best all-round body in the game. Endgame-gated so its raw superiority never dominates the T1-5 robes you wore earlier; tier IS the protecting axis, and every lower robe owns a rider trait Lordly doesn't have.
items.desc:
A luxurious robe worn by high-ranking nobles. Enchanted with protective magick.
Physical Attack +2. Magick Attack +1. Grants Protect and Shell.

proposed.rider: PA+2, MA+1, innate Protect, innate Shell

items.name: Wayfarer Boots
items.identity: Earliest Move source. The cheap scout/flanker sandal; wins on tier-1 availability.
items.flavorOverride: Worn soft by a thousand leagues of road, they carry their wearer a stride past any march.

items.name: Cragstep Boots
items.identity: The Jump+1 vertical-reach pick. Orthogonal to Wayfarer (vertical vs horizontal); same tier.
items.flavorOverride: Iron-cleated boots that grip sheer rock; their wearer climbs where others go around.

items.name: Roamer's Boots
items.identity: Mobility king: Move+1 AND Jump+1. Pure positioning for thieves/Ninjas; pays its mid tier vs the cheaper singles.
items.flavorOverride: Roving boots cut for the restless foot, swift on flat ground and sure on the high crags.

items.name: Storm-Tread Boots
items.identity: Anti-Bolt / anti-pin tech boot. Not mobility at all; a hard counter to Lightning casters and Immobilize lockdown.
items.flavorOverride: Boots soled in black gum that drink the thunderbolt and shrug off any snare meant to root.

items.name: Featherfoot Boots
items.identity: Permanent Float: ignores Earth/quake and all floor traps, walks water/lava as level. The terrain-immunity boot (no Move number).
items.flavorOverride: So lightly made the wearer never quite touches earth, drifting clear of quake and mire.

items.name: Fleetfoot Shoes
items.identity: The only tempo boot: Speed+1 = more turns, the scarcest stat in the slot. Endgame-gated; competes with the whole slot for raw tempo.
items.flavorOverride: Winged at the heel in the old fashion; whoever laces them finds the world slowed by half.

items.name: Sprinter's Shoes
items.identity: The mage's boot: MA+1 AND Move+1. The only boot touching a damage stat; reach for casters without spending the glove slot.
items.flavorOverride: Crimson shoes of battle-mages, lending fleeter feet and a sharper edge to spells cast.

items.name: Ironhand Gauntlets
items.identity: Entry PA stick, bumped to PA+2 so it isn't trash next to Bracers. Cheap early physical boost for any martial job.
items.flavorOverride: Plated gauntlets that lend a green recruit's arm the grip and heft of a far older hand.

items.name: Genji Gloves
items.identity: The only dual-stat glove (PA+2/MA+1, magic-knight leaning physical). Less PA than Bracers (3>2), less MA than Magepower (2>1), subset of neither. Wins on breadth + the iconic steal.
items.desc:
Vermilion gloves that boost physical and magickal prowess, made using techniques from a distant land.
Physical Attack +2. Magick Attack +1.

items.name: Runecast Gloves
items.identity: The caster's stat stick: the only MA+2 source in the slot. A pure mage prefers this over Genji (more MA).
items.flavorOverride: Gloves etched with running script that hum against the palm, sharpening every incantation.

items.name: Titan Grips
items.identity: The PA apex: PA+3, the only +3 stat in the slot. The pure-physical capstone; gives zero MA.
items.flavorOverride: Grips wrought for a giant's labor; the arm sheathed in them strikes with mountain force.

items.name: Mirror Ring
items.identity: Permanent Reflect: bounces single-target magic back at casters; also bank-shots buffs off allies. The anti-mage staple.
items.flavorOverride: A polished band that throws a hostile spell back along its path, into the caster's face.

items.name: Warding Ring
items.identity: Early anti-clock ring: never Doomed (countdown KO) or Slept. Cheap Ch2 status insurance.
items.flavorOverride: A plain warding band that lets no creeping curse take root nor doom-clock start its count.

items.name: Sealward Ring
items.identity: The caster's seal-breaker: never Silenced (can't lose spells) or Berserked (can't lose control). Keeps a mage online.
items.flavorOverride: A sealed band keeping a caster's tongue free and their wits their own when foes would gag.

items.name: Cursed Ring
items.identity: Dark Pact ring (unique): PA+2/MA+2/Speed+2/Move+1/Jump+1, innate Undead+Float, absorbs Dark, weak Holy — high risk/reward build-around (community-requested buff).
items.desc:
A ring inhabited by evil spirits that imparts great power, but binds its wearer to the living dead.
Physical Attack +2. Magick Attack +2. Speed +2. Move +1. Jump +1. Innate Undead and Float. Absorbs Dark damage. Weak to Holy (takes extra damage).

proposed.rider: PA+2, MA+2, Speed+2, Move+1, Jump+1, innate Undead and Float, absorb Dark, weak Holy

items.name: Seraph Ring
items.identity: Survivability crown (unisex): auto-Reraise + immune KO/Blind. The male answer to Chantage; the 'won't stay dead' ring.
items.flavorOverride: A band blessed by a kind seraph; though death take its wearer, it lifts them whole again.

items.name: Adamant Bangle
items.identity: The only stat armlet: +1 PA AND +1 MA plus immune Slow. Hybrid stat + tempo with no Undead drawback; a safe middle vs the Cursed Ring gamble.
items.flavorOverride: A hard, clear-cut bangle that steadies blade and spell, and lets no working drag the step.

items.name: Stoneward Armlet
items.identity: Anti-petrify: immune Stop (turn-locked) and Stone (instant loss). The 'you literally can't act' insurance vs Time mages.
items.flavorOverride: An armlet of cool jade that keeps the flesh supple against the spell that would stone it.

items.name: Sanctus Beads
items.identity: The 108-gems armlet: immune the four 'corruption' statuses AND strong to all 8 elements (every element heals you) - which amplifies elemental damage taken too. Bizarre element-soak grail, dominates no pure-defense armlet.
items.flavorOverride: A strand of prayer-gems; corruption slides off the wearer while every element pours in.

proposed.rider: immune Undead, Vampire, Toad, Poison, boost all elements

items.name: Clearmind Armlet
items.identity: Anti-mind-control: never Charmed or Confused (no turning on your team) plus halve Dark. The only armlet mixing immunity with element resist.
items.flavorOverride: An armband that keeps the mind one's own, deaf to honeyed words and fog, and dulls shadow.

items.name: Unbound Armlet
items.identity: Anti-lockdown: never Disabled (can't act) or Immobilized (can't move). The budget 'stay in the fight' armlet.
items.flavorOverride: A guardian's armlet suffering neither shackle nor seizure; its bearer never loses a move.

items.name: Drifter's Cape
items.identity: The starter balanced cloak (10/10). Earliest evade in the whole slot; equal phys/mag, asks nothing. Only T1 evade.
items.flavorOverride: A drifter's well-kept cape, plain and even in make, ready to turn a blow from any quarter.

items.name: Duelist's Cape
items.identity: The anti-physical cloak (18 phys / 6 mag). Trades mag-dodge for cheap strong phys evade; the front-line dodge vs melee maps.
items.flavorOverride: A fencer's cape, weighted to sweep aside a thrust; better at parrying steel than sorcery.

items.name: Runecloak
items.identity: The caster cloak: mag-leaning evade (12/18) PLUS MA+1. The only cloak with a stat rider; dodge spells AND hit harder. Lower phys is the tradeoff.
items.flavorOverride: A cloak stitched with quiet runes that bend spellcraft astray and sharpen the wearer's.

items.name: Sylvan Shroud
items.identity: The phys-leaning mid cloak (25/15). The all-rounder dodge tank's pick; forks against Vampire on which axis you need.
items.flavorOverride: Elven weave light as leaf-shadow, slipping its wearer just past the falling blow.

items.name: Nocturne Cape
items.identity: The anti-magic cloak (20 phys / 25 mag) PLUS innate Regen. Mirror of Elven; self-sustaining dodge vs caster-heavy maps. Does not dominate Elven (forks on axis + Regen vs raw phys).
items.flavorOverride: A dusk-dark cape that mends flesh as it hides it, turning the wearer aside from spells.

items.name: Zephyr Cloak
items.identity: The phys-evade apex (35/20). Dedicated melee-dodge capstone; trails the mag-cloaks on magic evade, no rider - raw phys-avoidance is the sell.
items.flavorOverride: So airy it scarcely seems worn; the blow that should land finds only breeze where it fell.

items.name: Invisibility Cloak
items.identity: Starts each battle Invisible (untargetable + crit on the break) plus 30 phys evade. magEv 0 is the deliberate hole. The assassin/opener cloak; does not dominate Featherweave (less phys, zero mag).
items.desc:
This cloak allows the wearer to blend in perfectly with their surroundings.
While equipped, grants Invisibility at the start of battle.

items.name: Chantage
items.identity: The immortality perfume (female): permanent Regen + auto-Reraise. The 'never dies' throne; stronger than Angel Ring because Regen heals the Reraise back up.
items.desc:
The soothing scent of this perfume gives a sensation of endless vitality.
While equipped, grants Regen and Reraise.

items.name: Envoûtement
items.identity: The zoner perfume (female): Float + Reflect. Ignores terrain AND bounces magic in one slot. Female-gated separate pool, so it never strictly dominates the unisex Reflect Ring / Featherfoot Boots.
items.desc:
The refreshing fragrance of this perfume makes one feel light as air, and able to repel even the mightiest of magicks.
While equipped, grants Float and Reflect.

items.name: Septième Sens
items.identity: The aggressive caster perfume (female): MA+1 + Haste + opens Invisible. The burst-mage / opener throne. Female-gated, so never dominates a unisex item.
items.desc:
A perfume with an otherworldly aroma that grants a sense of unbound celerity.
Magick Attack +1. Grants Haste. Begins battle Transparent.

items.name: Sortilège
items.identity: The bulwark perfume (female): Protect AND Shell (-50% physical AND magical). The defensive wall; turns a fragile caster into a brick.
items.desc:
A perfume with a rich redolence that gives a sensation of being enveloped by potent blessings.
While equipped, grants Protect and Shell.

items.name: Scholar's Ring
items.identity: Doubles JP earned. Zero combat value - a pure progression item; swap on while grinding, off for fights. Owns its lane outright.
items.flavorOverride: Treasure Master: a scholar's eye marks where treasure lies hidden on the field.
